title: 目標達成の後に・コード：ファイアー！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The first week of summer camp is here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Amidst the sea, mountains, and festivals, Mayano
Top Gun is...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Wheeze... ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
My speed's definitely gone up a whole Mach,
hasn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm well on my way to being the best racer this
year—wait no, the greatest racer of all time!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: No! It's totally true!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I need to make you say that I'm the racer who
twinkles the brightest!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Even more brilliant...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Than Brian was that day.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Argh, stop it! You can't say that name!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...C'mon, I really can't let my guard down, can I?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Darn it. Why do I still have to be in my classic
year? As soon as I'm a senior, I'm gonna challenge
Br—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wait!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Which races are left in the Triple Crown tour?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Crown tour. The route Narita Brian
took to become Triple Crown champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Spring Satsuki Sho and the Japanese
Derby already finished, all that's left is the final
Triple Crown tour race...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Okay! ☆ Then I know what my next target is!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'll make you even more excited than when you
watch Brian run!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Heehee! ☆ You think so?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Well, you like me when I'm fired up, don't you? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that, we have a new goal—the Kikuka Sho!
